tools.name: gifsmith
tools.description: Turn any video into an animated GIF entirely in your browser. No uploads, no watermark; works offline.

tools.name: zipsafe
tools.description: Create and extract ZIP archives entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
tools.status_reason: Built on 2026-06-25. 35 tests pass, production build succeeds, and a full create→extract round-trip was verified in-browser via the Claude Preview MCP: a 2-file archive was built (73% smaller, valid PK magic), re-ingested, listed from the central directory, extracted, and the decompressed content matched byte-for-byte. Error path (corrupt zip), threat-model/how-it-works/about modals, glossary tooltips, Escape-to-close, and mobile + dark-mode layouts were all verified; a hidden-banner CSS bug found via screenshot was fixed. NOT deployed: gh CLI auth token is still invalid (gh api user → HTTP 401) and no other GitHub credential is available, so repo creation/push/Pages/DNS/PR could not run. Local git repo is committed on main and ready to push once `gh auth login` is re-run.

tools.name: veilpix
tools.description: Hide an AES-256 encrypted message or file inside an ordinary image via LSB steganography, in your browser. No uploads.
tools.status_reason: Built on 2026-06-24. 29 tests pass, production build succeeds, and a full hide→reveal round-trip (text + wrong-passphrase rejection), modals, glossary, error path, and mobile layout were all verified in-browser via the Claude Preview MCP. NOT deployed: gh CLI auth token is still invalid (gh api user → HTTP 401) and no other GitHub credential is available, so repo creation/push/Pages/DNS/PR could not run. Local git repo is committed on main and ready to push once `gh auth login` is re-run.

tools.name: sealbox
tools.description: Lock any file with a password in your browser using AES-256. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
tools.status_reason: Built on 2026-06-23. 42 tests pass, production build succeeds, and a full lock→unlock round-trip (incl. wrong-password rejection) was verified in-browser via the Preview MCP. NOT deployed: gh CLI auth token is still invalid (gh api user → HTTP 401) and no other GitHub credential is available, so repo creation/push/Pages/DNS/PR could not run. Local git repo is committed on main and ready to push once `gh auth login` is re-run.

tools.name: metascrub
tools.description: Strip hidden metadata (GPS, camera serial, timestamps) from photos losslessly, in your browser. No uploads.
tools.status_reason: Built, 25 tests pass, production build + full browser dry-run verified locally. NOT deployed: gh CLI auth token is invalid and no other GitHub credential is available, so repo creation/push/Pages could not run. Local git repo is committed on main and ready to push once `gh auth login` is re-run.

tools.name: bgwipe
tools.description: Erase image backgrounds in your browser with an in-browser ML model (RMBG-1.4). Photos never leave your device.
tools.status_reason: Built on 2026-06-21, tests pass. Orphaned by a prior interrupted run — never deployed or registered. Same blocker: gh CLI auth is invalid. Ready to deploy once auth is restored.

tools.name: pdf-crush
tools.description: Compress PDFs in your browser using MozJPEG WASM. No uploads, no accounts, no server.

tools.name: dropwell
tools.description: End-to-end encrypted peer-to-peer file sharing in the browser. No backend, no installs.
